expectedErrors.message: BigInteger missing TryWriteBigEndian, WriteBigEndian from IBinaryInteger_1
BigInteger TryFormat incompatible with INumber_1 (missing UTF-8 overload)

notes: These errors are pre-existing interface conformance issues in .NET BCL types.
BigInteger and NFloat don't fully implement all interface methods.
This is a .NET BCL issue, not a tsbindgen issue.
Zero syntax errors (TS1xxx) is required - these must always be zero.
